summary: Tested Intelligent Catalogue Import & Amazon Listing System. All 14 backend tests pass. UI testing verified Import Wizard with 3 tabs (Bulk Scrape, Single URL, Manual Entry), pricing calculation formula, Select All checkbox, and 3-step import flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing formula correctly implemented: Amazon Price = (Website Price + Margin%) + 18% GST
Default margin of 70% is correctly applied
Import Wizard has proper 3-step flow: Scrape → Select & Price → Push to Amazon
Manual Entry form validates required fields (name, price)
Products are correctly saved to product_datasheets collection with amazon_fields
Select All checkbox works for product selection
Global margin can be applied to all products
seed_data_creation: None - test products cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalogue Import System fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_82_catalogue_import.py covers: 1) Import product endpoint with pricing calculation, 2) Scrape product URL endpoint, 3) Authentication requirements, 4) Validation errors, 5) Product persistence verification. UI testing verified: Import Wizard modal, 3 tabs (Bulk Scrape, Single URL, Manual Entry), pricing formula display, Select All checkbox, Import Products button, and Push to Amazon step.

features_verified.import_wizard_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens with 'Import Products from Website' title
features_verified.three_tabs_present: PASS - Bulk Scrape, Single URL, Manual Entry tabs all present
features_verified.manual_entry_form: PASS - Form has Product Name, Website Price, Description, Image URL fields
features_verified.add_to_list_button: PASS - Adds product to list and shows 'Products Ready' section
features_verified.select_all_checkbox: PASS - Checkbox works for selecting all products
features_verified.pricing_formula_display: PASS - Shows 'Amazon Price = (Website Price + Margin%) + 18% GST'
features_verified.import_products_button: PASS - Imports selected products to database
features_verified.step3_push_to_amazon: PASS - Shows imported products with Push to Amazon button
features_verified.amazon_seller_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown for selecting firm with Amazon credentials
features_verified.product_saved_with_amazon_fields: PASS - Products saved with amazon_fields including website_price, mrp, selling_price, margin_percent, gst_percent
